title: pinus nigra var. austriaca
intro: Pinus nigra var. austriaca, also known as the Austrian black pine, is a subspecies of the black pine tree, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pinus nigra var. austriaca include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or tincture, and can also be used to make essential oils, which are often used in aromatherapy for their calming and respiratory benefits.
